'''Mujmai Iinan''' was a member of the [[Warrior caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. A direct subordinate of [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]], he told the Warmaster that [[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi]] could be taken with half the number of ships originally expected to conquer the planet. While the [[Battle of Kubindi]] was a success, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kyp Durron]] was able to evacuate a larger number of [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]] from the planet then originally expected. For his failure, Warmaster Lah had him sacrificed to the [[Yun'o]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{1stm}}
